log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Kender — Bardic Musician: SUCCESS. 13 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13

ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Kender — Bardic Musician.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:1+3=4 vs AC 14] MISS.

→ Kender — Bardic Musician: DEX save [d20:3+6=9 vs DC 11] FAIL! 2 radiant damage. HP: 52/67
--- Kender — Bardic Musician --- HP: 52/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):19+1=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):19+1=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):10+1=11 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):18+1=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:3+4=7 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 2/5 targets affected.

ACTION: Shakes Cult Fanatic awake! Charmed + Incapacitated removed.
